requirement_topic.en: HOPS/HEP-ODS Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: HOPS/HEP-ODS并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: HOPS/HEP-ODS併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Croatia should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to HOPS (Croatian transmission system operator) and HEP-ODS (distribution network operator) technical review and HERA (Croatian Energy Regulatory Agency) energy-sector oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Croatia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Croatia uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Croatia is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Croatian project files should document protection-threshold settings, reconnection timing, and commissioning records for the specific HOPS or HEP-ODS connection point.
summary.zh: 克罗地亚并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受HOPS（克罗地亚输电系统运营商）和HEP-ODS（配电网运营商）技术审查及HERA（克罗地亚能源监管机构）能源监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对克罗地亚230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。克罗地亚与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：克罗地亚为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。克罗地亚项目文件应记录特定HOPS或HEP-ODS接入点的保护阈值设置、重连延迟和调试记录。
summary.zht: 克羅地亞併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受HOPS（克羅地亞輸電系統運營商）和HEP-ODS（配電網運營商）技術審查及HERA（克羅地亞能源監管機構）能源監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對克羅地亞230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。克羅地亞與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：克羅地亞為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。克羅地亞項目文件應記錄特定HOPS或HEP-ODS接入點的保護閾值設置、重連延遲和調試記錄。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
HOPS grid-connection and commissioning requirements for the relevant installation
HERA electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Croatia low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Croatia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to HOPS/HEP-ODS acceptance or HERA project review in Croatia.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非克罗地亚50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为HOPS/HEP-ODS认可或HERA项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非克羅地亞50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為HOPS/HEP-ODS認可或HERA項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Croatia HOPS/HEP-ODS project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Croatia-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Croatia voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. Project files should document protection-threshold settings and reconnection timing aligned to Croatia's EN 50549-1/-2 implementation and HOPS/HEP-ODS grid-connection requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代克罗地亚HOPS/HEP-ODS项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、克罗地亚专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称克罗地亚电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。项目文件应记录与克罗地亚EN 50549-1/-2实施及HOPS/HEP-ODS并网要求一致的保护阈值设置和重连延迟。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代克羅地亞HOPS/HEP-ODS項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、克羅地亞專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱克羅地亞電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。項目文件應記錄與克羅地亞EN 50549-1/-2實施及HOPS/HEP-ODS並網要求一致的保護閾值設置和重連延遲。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through HOPS/HEP-ODS technical review and any applicable HERA project approval or oversight
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Croatia HOPS/HEP-ODS approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Croatia HOPS/HEP-ODS grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Croatia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and verify current HOPS, HEP-ODS, and HERA project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足克罗地亚HOPS/HEP-ODS并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为克罗地亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并在出货或调试前直接核实现行HOPS、HEP-ODS和HERA项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足克羅地亞HOPS/HEP-ODS併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為克羅地亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並在出貨或調試前直接核實現行HOPS、HEP-ODS和HERA項目要求。
